titleStmt.title: SII 38.154: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 154. (A.R. No. 154 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the seventeenth pillar of the verandah, round the central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Begins with the mēykīrtti of the ruler, pugaḻ-mādu viḷaṅga. Records the purchase of two thousand kuḻi of land from the ūrār of Igaṇaiyūr, a dēvadāna of the temple of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr in Puḻal-nāḍu in Puḻal-kōṭṭam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, by an official, Śīrāḷaṇ Gaṇḍarādittan alias Irumuḍiśōla Viḻupparaiyaṉ of Koṟṟamaṅgalam in Tirunaraiyūr-nāḍu (a sub-division of) Kshatriyasikhāmaṇi-vaḷanāḍu in Chōḻa-maṇḍalam by auction. It is further recorded that this land was earmarked by the latter for disbursing thirty kalam of paddy and two kāśu as wages to the person who supplied water in the watershed, (called) Arumukkiyaṉ Kōdukulavan in (the locality) Saṅkarappāḍiyār Rājarājapperun-teruvu in Tiruvoṟṟiyūr established by the above person Śīrāḷaṇ Gaṇḍarādittan. Among the boundaries, a land owned Subramaṇya temple is mentioned. Tiruvoṟṟiyūr-uḍaiyāṉ Nārāyaṇaṉ Saraṇaṉ, the karaṇattān and Amudāṅgi Vaḷanin Isiṉṉa Ūnamili, (a native of) Igaṇaiyūr figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ
vaḷara malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟan=ta maṇi muṭicūṭit teṉ
ṉavar nilaikeṭa miṉavar kulai tara vikkalar ciṅkaṇar mel kaṭal pāya
ttikkaṉaittuṉ taṉcakkara naṭātti virasiṅṅāsanattup puvaṉamuḻutu
ṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kovirājakecari panmarāṉamuṭaiyār
śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu nāḷ Irunūṟṟu toṇṇū
ṟṟu Oṉṟāl jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu puḻalkoṭṭattu puḻal nāṭ
ṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār tevatāṉam Ikaṇaiyūr Ūrom
nilavilaiāvaṇak kaiyeḻuttu Eṅkaḷur nilam kiḻpāṟkellai
cuppiramaṇṇiyatevar nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai
maṇaliyāṉa ciṅkaviṣṇuccatuppetimaṅkalattellaikku vaṭakkum
melpāṟkellai vaikkāṭṭu Ellaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟke
llai vāṉavarapputteri kaḷarkku teṟkum Iṉṉākellai Uḷḷu
m Akappaṭṭa nilam Uḷnilam Oḻiviṉṟiye patiṉaṟu cāṇko
lāl kuḻi Iraṇṭāyiramum Iḷaiyavakait tiruppaḷḷittoṅkalu
ṭaiyārkaḷil coḻamaṇṭalattu kṣatriyaśikhāmaṇivaḷanāṭṭun tiruna
ṟaiyūrnāṭṭu koṟṟamaṅkalattu koṟṟamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ cirāḷaṉ kaṇṭarāti
tta(ṉa)nāṉa Irumuṭicoḻa tirunaṟaiyūrnāṭṭu viḻupparayanukku Ivaṉ tiruvo
ṟṟiyūril caṅkarappāṭiyār rājarājapperun=teruvil vaippitta taṇ
ṇirpan=tal Arumukkiyaṉ kotukulavanukkut taṇṇir Aṭṭuvānukku nivan=ta
ttukku veṇṭum nel muppatiṉ kalattukkum kācu Iraṇṭukkum Ituvey
nivatamāka peṟu vilaikkāṇam kiḻikaiyiṟcelak koṇṭu Oru kā
lāvatum Irukālāvatum mukkālāvatum Ituve Itukku poruḻ māvaṟu
tip poruṭcelavolaiyāvatākavum Itu vallatu veṟuporuṭkaḷ mā
vaṟutip poruṭcelavolaik kāṭṭukaveṉṟu collap peṟātārākavum Irumu
ṭicoḻat tirunaṟaiyūrnāṭṭu viḻupparayanukku vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu
kuṭuttom Ikaṇaiyūrūrom Ivarkaḷveṇṭa Eḻutineṉ tiruvo
ṟṟiyūr karaṇattāṉ tiruvoṟṟiyūr Uṭaiyāṉ nārāyaṇaṉ caraṇaneṉ I
vai Eṉṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Oṭṭi viṟṟukkuṭutteṉ IkaṇaiyūrRead ikaṇaiyūr Amutā
ṅki vaḷanin Iciṉṉa Ūnamiliyeṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu It taṇṇirppa
n=tal caṅkarappāṭiyār Iṭaiyil kiḻmel Eḻu kolum teṉvaṭal mukko
lum patiṉnaṟucāṇkolāl vilaiaṟakkoṇṭu vaittatu .
Digital edition of SII 38.154 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
